text:
There once was a tiny, sprightly fox named Felix. With a bushy tail and curious eyes, Felix lived out his days in a lush forest teeming with life. 

One sunny morning, Felix heard a peculiar rustling in the foliage. It wasn’t any ordinary creature; it was a unicorn! The unicorn glanced at Felix with a gaze filled with curiosity but also a hint of apprehension.

Felix couldn’t deny his awe—the creature was magnificent! It galloped away with swirling colors, leaving Felix enchanted.

Throughout the day, Felix spotted the unicorn twirling through clouds of pink fog and gliding amidst dappled sunlight. He learned the unicorn could communicate with voices melodic and soft.

As evening fell and the forest settled into its peaceful lullaby, Felix felt an urge to meet this mythical beast. He positioned himself quietly, hoping to catch another glimpse. With each flutter of wings, the unicorn neared.

Its hooves barely touched the ground as it paused,
